title: oldenlandia albonervia
intro: Oldenlandia albonervia, also known as Asian swampweed or swampweed, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia albonervia include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to relieve symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
